top_signals.title: SMFG Said to Weigh Strategy for India Assets Including Yes Bank
top_signals.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc. is evaluating its India strategy as it looks for ways to consolidate its presence in one of the world’s fastest-growing banking markets, people with knowledge of the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A Month After SpaceX IPO, Tesla’s Stock Keeps Holding Its Ground
top_signals.summary: In the weeks leading up to SpaceX’s monster IPO, many Wall Street pros feared the deal represented an existential threat for Elon Musk’s other giant, Tesla Inc. But after a month in the stock market, the outcome is far from clear.

top_signals.title: SoftBank and PayPay offer to invest up to $1.9bn in 7-Eleven parent
Stablecoin firm Circle wins final OCC approval to open national trust bank
top_signals.summary: Circle wins final OCC approval for First National Digital Currency Bank, with USDC reserve management planned for a later phase.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
